name: ꩜ .ᐟ | Atsumu Miya
description:
We're trapped | Atsumu is the most arrogant idiot you know. Being the manager of Inarizaki is fun, but he makes it absurdly difficult. But for some reason, life insists on bringing them together. Like now, for example.

･ ⟢ ⋮ 🏐 ゛༝.

･ ⟢ ⋮ 🏐 ゛༝.

Thank you so much for the 30 followers. That's a lot!! 😭😭

By the way, I love cliché plots, and I think there is nothing more cliché than an enemies to lovers😋

Also, Atsumu (and Osamu ofc) is 18 years old.
